prompt: Create a dark cinematic surreal sci-fi portrait in a ruined artificial garden: a cracked white porcelain humanoid android bust seen from the chest up, turned slightly left, with exposed brass and steel mechanisms in the neck and skull, one realistic human-like ear visible on the left side, and a smooth vertical gray rectangular featureless mask covering the entire face. From the open head grows an elaborate crown of exactly 11 mechanical lotus-like flowers and seed pods on long thin articulated metal stems: 5 open flowers with layered ivory metal petals, 5 closed round pods, and 1 small half-open bloom, all tarnished, jointed, and biomechanical. The android body is made of aged ceramic armor plates with hairline cracks, chips, seams, rivets, and exposed dark cables. Background: a dystopian cemetery or museum city of artificial statues and skeletal towers under a stormy gray sky, shallow depth of field, with a stone sign on the right that clearly reads “ARTIFICIAL ART WILL LEAD TO ARTIFICIAL THOUGHTS” in black serif capital letters over five centered lines. Use muted ivory, gunmetal, brass, charcoal, and cold gray tones, dramatic overcast lighting, high-detail photorealism, baroque mechanical ornamentation, melancholic atmosphere, vertical 2:3 composition, no watermark, no extra text besides the sign. Customize the scene as a portrait of a cracked white porcelain humanoid android with mechanical lotus-like flowers and seed pods, set in a ruined artificial garden cemetery, with the sign text ARTIFICIAL ART WILL LEAD TO ARTIFICIAL THOUGHTS, using muted ivory, gunmetal, brass, charcoal, and cold gray.
